info.name: AdaptIQ - Complete API Test Suite
info.description:
Comprehensive Postman collection for AdaptIQ backend.

IMPORTANT: Run the entire collection in order (use Runner). Folders depend on Auth tokens set by '1. Auth' folder.

Setup:
1. Set {{baseUrl}} to your server
2. Run the entire collection via Collection Runner
3. Tokens, IDs, and session data auto-propagate between requests

exec: console.log('Generated fresh run identities:', pm.collectionVariables.get('email1'), pm.collectionVariables.get('email2'));

if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Admin login OK', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); } else { pm.test('Admin login unauthorized before bootstrap', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(401); }); }
console.log('Admin login not available yet; bootstrap step will promote user1.');
pm.collectionVariables.set('classicQuestionText', d.question_text || d.text || 'Which pharaoh built the Great Pyramid?');
if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Hint generated', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); } else { pm.test('Hint unavailable (LLM down)', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(503); }); }

if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Challenge question generated', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); } else { pm.test('Challenge generator unavailable', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(503); }); }

if (!hasQuestion) { pm.test('Submit blocked without generated question', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(422); }); } else { pm.test('Submit answer OK', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); }
pm.test('Duplicate request invalid without prior submit', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(422); });

if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Custom question generated', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); } else { pm.test('Custom generator unavailable', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(503); }); }

if (!hasQuestion) { pm.test('Submit blocked without generated question', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(422); }); } else { pm.test('Custom answer submitted', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); }

if (!hasQuestion) { pm.test('Hint blocked without generated question', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(422); }); } else if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Hint generated', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); } else { pm.test('Hint unavailable (LLM down)', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(503); }); }
pm.test('PvP matched within polling window', () => { pm.expect.fail('No match found after polling'); });

body.raw:
{
  "question_text": "What year did World War II end? ({{$timestamp}})",
  "correct_answer": "1945",
  "options": ["1944", "1945", "1946", "1950"],
  "explanation": "World War II ended in 1945.",
  "topic": "History",
  "difficulty_irt": 2.0,
  "source": "admin",
  "primary_concept_id": "{{adminCreatedConceptId}}"
}

exec: pm.test('DB users table rows OK', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Duplicate approval did not create a second topic', () => {
pm.test('Delete already deleted rule returns 404', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Scholar ask OK', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); } else { pm.test('Scholar unavailable', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(503); }); }
if (pm.response.code === 400) { pm.test('Out-of-scope rejected', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(400); }); } else { pm.test('Scholar unavailable', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(503); }); }

if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Visual question fetched', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); } else { pm.test('Visual content unavailable', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(503); }); }
if (!hasQuestion) { pm.test('Visual hint blocked without question', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(422); }); } else { pm.test('Visual hint OK', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); }
if (!hasQuestion) { pm.test('Visual submit blocked without question', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(422); }); } else { pm.test('Visual submit OK', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); }

if (!hasQuestion) { pm.test('Visual explanation blocked without question', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(422); }); } else { pm.test('Visual explanation OK', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); }
